style_authority.note: Uses the calm high-frequency operations context to preserve causal direct manipulation while rejecting spectacle, delay, and input lockout.

reference_selection.note: Correctly applies motion quality, interaction physics, transform ownership, accessibility, performance, and runtime-validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Explicitly decides which motion should exist and removes decorative scaling, broad transitions, and non-causal travel.

evidence_level.note: Labels the evidence static source and treats lag, frame rate, visual jumps, touch conflict, and device feel as unverified.

verified_boundary.note: Separates visible code defects from runtime-only geometry, positioning, event arbitration, Reduced Motion, browser, and refresh-rate behavior.

design_moves.note: Covers capture, grab offset, local coordinates, 1:1 transforms, presentation-value interruption, CSS px/s velocity, projection, hysteresis, soft bounds, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Remains motion-specific and decisive, but 167 lines modestly exceed the requested 150-line budget.
